//: Multi-trade ICP config — 1-5 employee owner-operator small home-service shops.
//rationale: Same product fits all reactive-service trades where the owner himself fields calls between jobs. ~235K small-shop TAM across the 7 trades vs 30K HVAC-only.

trades.//: Original ICP. Strongest product-fit. Already validated.
Closest fit to HVAC — reactive emergency service, owner answers phone.
Same call-receiver pattern. Slightly less emergency-urgency than HVAC.
Emergency-heavy, small teams, high ticket. Phone capture critical.
100% emergency reactive. Solo operators. Tight product-fit.
Sun Belt heavy. Matches HVAC warmup geo. Less emergency than HVAC.
Sun Belt only. Seasonal. Add for diversification, not core.

//excluded_trades: Skipped — different buyer pattern or lower fit:

excluded.reason: Recurring monthly contracts, not call-driven. Phone capture less valuable.
Too varied. Buyer profile unstable. Hard to qualify.
Quote-driven sales cycle, not reactive. Phone capture useful but lower urgency.
Recurring contracts, lower-tier service. Different sales motion.

//rollout_plan: Tier 1-3 trades go LIVE first (HVAC + plumbing + electrical). Tier 4-7 added after we prove conv per trade. Each trade gets its own copy variant on the cold email body to test resonance.

rollout_phases.//: First send wave after warmup. Most product-fit trades. Validates broader ICP.
Expand to emergency-heavy verticals once phase 1 conv data lands.
Full multi-trade. Sun Belt seasonal peak. Maximum volume.
